raw_consumer_statement: I received a call on XX/XX/year> stating that I needed to call back the Citibank Loss protection and when I called them they said there was a purchase that was made and asked if I authorized it they gave me the amount I said, no I did not authorize this purchase and from then on, I was on the phone with this imposter For about an hour giving him all my information and my Social Security number today on XX/XX/XXXX I called city bank credit card. I called the number on the back of my card that was different from the number I had previously called and told them of the incident they said I did have two charges on my card, one in the amount of {$920.00} and the other {$540.00} both made on XX/XX/year> I told Citibank that I did not authorize these charges and I asked who authorized these charges and they said it was a company called XXXX XXXX  so they flagged my account for identity theft and canceled my credit card
